Comfortable Accommodations: Hotel Materia in Oaxaca City offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, free WiFi, and modern amenities including a work desk and TV.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace or enjoy the outdoor seating area. Breakfast is available in the room, featuring American, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options.

Modern Comforts: Casa Arrona Oaxaca in Oaxaca City offers a recently renovated bed and breakfast with air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy amenities such as bathrobes, hairdryers, and free toiletries.

Prime Location: Located in the city centre, Casa Arrona Oaxaca is a short walk from Santo Domingo Temple (4 minutes) and Oaxaca Cathedral (less than 1 km).
